name: date-field
title: Date Field
description: Typed segmented day/month/year date entry with real-date validation, no calendar.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value as an ISO YYYY-MM-DD string.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value as an ISO YYYY-MM-DD string.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on every edit; undefined while the entry is incomplete or not a real date.

props.name: aria-invalid
props.description: Marks all segments invalid and applies the error ring.

clinicalNotes: Built for dates a calendar picker handles poorly — a birth year 80 years back. Validation rejects impossible dates (31 Feb, month 13) and only emits an ISO string once all segments form a real date; callers still gate future DOBs and compute age against a caller-supplied 'as of' date. Segments auto-advance and support Backspace to the previous segment; every segment carries an aria-label for screen readers. Store the emitted ISO date; render in the patient's locale via the `order` prop.
notes: medcn-original primitive (no shadcn/Radix counterpart). The base for DateOfBirthField and any typed date entry.
